clues: Network performance momentarily degrades every few minutes across the entire office.
Users report brief interruptions during video calls at regular intervals.
The core switch logs show frequent Spanning Tree Protocol topology change notifications.
The topology changes are triggered by a specific access switch that is connected via two uplinks.
That access switch has PortFast enabled on both of its uplink ports to the core.
